chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Tr. Appln. No. S – 45 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 17.05.2024 Mr. Iftikhar Ali Arain, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Abdul Ahad Buriro, Advocate has filed power on behalf of Respondent No.2. I have heard learned counsel for parties. With their consent, this application is dismissed. However, the trial Court is directed to decide Criminal Case No.605/2021 (Re- The State vs. Salman Khan & others) arising out of FIR/Crime No.122 of 2021 registered at PS A-Section, Sukkur in accordance with law within a period of one month purely on merits and without being influenced by the fact that the accused filed transfer application. Judge ARBROHI
